steps.title: Identify what Monteiro did with these people
steps.content: The relative clause "whom he asked to bring back rare and valuable objects from their international travels" explains the blank: Monteiro made requests of friends and colleagues and relied on them to deliver materials he could not get himself.

steps.title: Match the relationship to a verb phrase
steps.content: We need a phrase that conveys reliance on others to obtain something — not an attitude, opposition, or warning.

steps.title: Eliminate per choice
steps.content:
• "admired": describes a feeling toward the friends, not the act of getting items through them — misread of the request relationship. ✗
  • "disagreed with": implies conflict, which contradicts the cooperative request described in the relative clause. ✗
  • "warned": would mean Monteiro cautioned them — nothing in the text suggests danger, and it doesn't explain how items were obtained. ✗
  • "depended on": captures the reliance — he counted on friends and colleagues to bring back rare items from abroad. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
